allow_group_use.description: Allow administrators to use mail in groups

auto_notify_qq_mail_senders.description: Notify QQ-mail senders by private QQ message
auto_notify_qq_mail_senders.hint: Only numeric@qq.com senders that are already QQ friends are notified. Existing unread mail is ignored on startup.

mail_poll_seconds.description: Unread inbox polling interval in seconds

qq_mail_notice_template.hint: Supports {subject} and {body}. This is a QQ reply and never sends another email.
